comment: Non-card art assets for the art tracker. Hand-maintained. Per asset: 'artist' (who is working on it — fill in manually) and 'done': true when final art is in. Status is DERIVED: done → Done; artist set → In Progress; else Placeholder. Cards are NOT listed here — they come from ../card-data/cards.json (artFinal) + ./card-briefs.json (artist/brief).

assets.name: Fertilizer
assets.effect: Gain Brambles.

assets.name: Wormy Apple
assets.effect: Heal HP. Add Wormy cards into your Hand.

assets.name: Buddy in a Bottle
assets.effect: Add a random Familiar into your Hand for free this turn.

assets.name: Vial of Smoke
assets.effect: Gain Block. (Card-only payload: Light the Candle / Hidden in Smoke)

assets.name: Noxious Brew
assets.effect: Deal damage. (Card-only payload: Bottomless Cauldron)

assets.name: Mushroom Extract
assets.effect: Discard Hand, draw 6 cards that cost 0 for the rest of combat.

assets.name: Large Pockets
assets.effect: Upon pickup gain potion slots. Starting relic.

assets.name: Wormy's Apple
assets.effect: Upon pickup gain Max HP. Each combat, add a Wormy into your Hand.

assets.name: Sack of Treats
assets.brief: A burlap dripping sack of bones and a limb sticking out.
assets.effect: Your Familiars create ALL of their cards at the start of your turn.

categories.title: Familiar Pets
categories.dims: Flexible — sprite is scaled in code (~0.4x). Match card-art res, e.g. 1000x760.

assets.name: Wolf Pet
assets.effect: Cosmetic combat sprite; currently reuses Wolf Familiar card art.

assets.name: Bear Pet
assets.effect: Cosmetic combat sprite; currently reuses Bear Familiar card art.

assets.name: Owl Pet
assets.effect: Cosmetic combat sprite; currently reuses Owl Familiar card art.

assets.name: Cat Pet
assets.effect: Cosmetic combat sprite; currently reuses Cat Familiar card art.

assets.name: Rat Pet
assets.effect: Cosmetic combat sprite; currently reuses Rat Familiar card art.

assets.name: Crow Pet
assets.effect: Cosmetic combat sprite; currently reuses Crow Familiar card art.

assets.name: Character Select Portrait
assets.effect: Character select screen portrait.

assets.name: Character Select Portrait (Locked)
assets.effect: Locked-state variant of the select portrait.

assets.name: Character Icon
assets.effect: Small in-run character badge icon.

assets.name: Map Marker
assets.effect: Icon shown on the world map.

assets.name: Big Energy Icon
assets.effect: Large energy orb icon.

assets.name: Text Energy Icon
assets.effect: Small inline energy icon used in card text.

assets.name: Combat Body Sprite / Animations
assets.effect: The in-combat character body. No override exists yet (PlaceholderCharacterModel) — renders as base-game Ironclad. Biggest missing asset.

assets.name: Card Frame Fallbacks
assets.effect: Generic fallback images (card.png, potion.png, relic.png, relic_outline.png, power.png, mystery.png) shown when a specific asset is missing.
